title: New Balance Hoodie — Gray
image_captions: Gray New Balance hoodie with white logo on chest. No measurements, tags, or flaws visible.
Gray New Balance hoodie with white logo on chest. No measurements, tags, or flaws visible.
Front view showing grey hoodie with white 'new balance' text and logo on chest.
Detail shot showing grey heathered fabric with ribbed cuffs and hem. No tape measure, brand tag, or care label visible.
Neck tag reading New Balance Size S. Care label showing 100% Cotton. Made in Indonesia.
Care label showing 57% cotton, 40% polyester, 3% spandex. Neck tag reading [Brand] Size [Size].
Vertical tape measure showing 59cm at the ribbed hem edge.
Horizontal tape measure showing 50cm at the hem edge.
Back view showing grey hoodie with hood and ribbed cuffs.
enhanced_description:
New Balance Hoodie — Gray
Brand: New Balance
Size: S
Condition: Like New
Composition: 57% Cotton, 40% Polyester, 3% Spandex
Color: Gray

Measurements (Laid Flat):
Pit-to-Pit: 50cm
Length: 59cm

About the Piece
This is a crisp, heathered gray New Balance hoodie in pristine condition. The fabric feels soft and durable with a comfortable fit that's perfect for casual wear or layering up during cooler days. No signs of wear, fading, or damage—just ready to go.

Style Note: Minimalist Streetwear / Athleisure

Key Detail
Classic white embroidered logo on the chest paired with ribbed cuffs and hem for a polished look. Made in Indonesia.

Seller Notes
Shipping: 🚀 Next day shipping guaranteed!

Shop My Closet: Check out my other offers for more New Balance items—I'm happy to offer bundle discounts if you see something else you like!

Questions? Drop a comment or send an offer. I'm responsive and ready to ship.
